Petition For Revocation Of Second And Third Trust
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Mar-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Hill and Nancy Field (Counsel for Karen Ward); J. Brittain Habagger (Counsel for Richard Harrer and Janet Harrer).

Counsel appeared at the continuance call to inform the Court that they had reached a stipulation as to certain issues in the case and presented an Order to the Court for signature. After review by Ms. Nahnsen and the Court, the Order was signed in open court and the matter continued for status to March 6, 2007 at 9:00 a.m.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR# 5802; Bailiff: Deputies Cruz and Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
